title: aporodes fragrans subsp. celebica
intro: Aporodes fragrans subsp. celebica is a plant species, also known as the Celebes fragrant tree or Celebes aporodes, belonging to the Annonaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which are used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Aporodes fragrans subsp. celebica include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In traditional medicine, the seeds are typically prepared as an infusion or tincture, or used in herbal preparations such as capsules or syrups.
